reference: THE FIRST MAN MAKING A SHAKEDOWN WILL GET THE SAME TREATMENT WE'RE GOING TO USE ON THE STONEWALL BOYS YOU'LL GET DOUBLE PAY HERE AND YOU CAN LIVE ON IT
text: The first man making a shakedown will get the same treatment we're going to use on the Stonewall Boys. You'll get double pay here, and you can live on it.
